name: PrimeRealEstate
description: Minimalist cityscape illustration with line art style and eco-friendly accent colors

accent.description: Used for trees, window panes, and hot balloons - represents sustainability and eco-friendliness

neutral.description: Used for some window pane fills and secondary elements

colorPalette.usageNotes: Low saturation with single highlight color. Minimalist approach with clear visual hierarchy.

typography.notes: Original image contains no text. Recommendations are for text overlay compatibility.

gridSystem.visualMetaphor: Buildings naturally divide into 8-10 vertical sections

proportions.description: Small → Medium → Large building proportions following golden section rhythm

layers.foreground: street elements (people, cars, trees) - thicker lines, clearer details
layers.background: mountains, water, hot balloons - thinnest lines, distance effect

buildings.description: Can be abstracted as information cards. Modern UI requires slight rounding

shadow.notes: Original has no shadows. Added for UI depth enhancement

brandElements.iconSemantics: Unified - all people/animals are simple outlines with no facial details, representing inclusivity and universality

visualElements.sceneComposition: Asymmetric with visual balance through left/right hot balloons, mountains, and building clusters

focalPoints.primary: green hot balloon (right-center) + green window panes

visualElements.colorAnchors: 12 green window panes distributed across buildings + 1 solid green hot balloon

accessibility.colorBlindness: single accent color may be challenging for some forms of color blindness
accessibility.recommendation: use additional visual cues (patterns, icons) beyond just color for important information

metadata.notes: Extracted visual style for design system integration
